summary: Tested Framer Motion animations on Revendeur and Vendeur dashboards, AnimatedNumber component, tab transitions, and product publication flow. All features working correctly. Fixed margin display bug in Revendeur dashboard. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified with animations.
critical_code_review_comments: AnimatedComponents.js well-structured with reusable animation variants (staggerContainer, statCardVariant, tabContentVariant)
AnimatedNumber component correctly animates from 0 to target value with easing
RevendeurDashboard.js uses AnimatePresence for smooth tab transitions
VendorDashboard.js has consistent dark theme with gradient backgrounds
Both dashboards have proper data-testid attributes for testing
ESLint warnings for missing useEffect dependencies - not critical but should be addressed

bug_fixed.issue: Margin display showed '+ FCFA' without value because API returns 'dropshipper_share_fcfa' but code looked for 'revendeur_share_fcfa'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use (product.dropshipper_share_fcfa || product.revendeur_share_fcfa) for backward compatibility

context_for_next_testing_agent: Framer Motion animations fully implemented and working on both dashboards. AnimatedNumber component animates stat values. Tab transitions use AnimatePresence for smooth effects. Product publication flow verified - products added by Revendeur appear on public shop at /boutique/{shop_slug}. Fixed margin display bug in Revendeur dashboard.

Revendeur Dashboard Animations.details: 4 animated stat cards (Produits actifs, Commandes, Complétées, Gains totaux) with hover effects, gradient backgrounds, and AnimatedNumber counters

Vendor Dashboard Animations.details: 4 animated stat cards (Produits, En attente, Ventes, Revenus FCFA) with dark theme, gradient backgrounds, and subscription plan display with emoji

Tab Transitions.details: Smooth transitions between tabs using AnimatePresence and tabContentVariant. Tested: Tableau de bord, Catalogue produits, Mes produits, Commandes, Statistiques, Abonnement

AnimatedNumber Component.details: Numbers animate from 0 to target value with ease-out cubic easing. Visible on both dashboards for stat values.

Hover Effects.details: Cards have whileHover animations (y: -5, scale: 1.02) with spring transitions. Icons rotate on hover.

Product Publication Flow.details: Products added by Revendeur from catalog appear on public shop at /boutique/super-boutique-drop-0a273bba. Products visible: PROVEND3 (10,500 FCFA), Chargeur dell petit bout (12,000 FCFA), Câble d'alimentation (3,000 FCFA), BBB (1,300 FCFA)

Public Shop Page.details: Shop displays correctly with header, description, share/copy/subscribe buttons, and product grid with Commander buttons

Margin Display (Fixed).details: Margin values now display correctly: +2,500 FCFA, +1,000 FCFA, +150 FCFA etc.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/revendeur/dashboard: PASS - returns stats with numeric values for AnimatedNumber
backend_api_tests.GET /api/revendeur/catalog: PASS - returns products available to add
backend_api_tests.GET /api/revendeur/products: PASS - returns revendeur's products with dropshipper_share_fcfa
backend_api_tests.GET /api/vendor/dashboard: PASS - returns stats with numeric values for AnimatedNumber
backend_api_tests.GET /api/shop/{slug}: PASS - returns public shop with products
backend_api_tests.POST /api/revendeur/products: PASS - adds product to revendeur catalog

eslint_warnings: AnimatedComponents.js:328 - React Hook useEffect missing dependency 'displayValue'
RevendeurDashboard.js:159 - useEffect missing dependencies for fetch functions
